description: Fresh, light coastal bites perfect for opening your meal.

items.name: Crispy Salt & Pepper Calamari
items.description: Tender squid rings, seasoned salt & pepper crust, fresh chilli, spring onions, fresh lemon, house tartare.

items.name: Tempura Prawns
items.description: Crispy light tempura battered tiger prawns, served with a sweet chilli dipping sauce and fresh lime.

items.name: Gambas Pil Pil
items.description: Sizzling king prawns cooked in rich garlic butter, onions, and spicy chorizo. Served with lemon.

items.name: Blistered Padrón Peppers
items.description: Pan-seared Padrón peppers with sea salt, served alongside grilled Cypriot halloumi cheese.

description: Social plates designed to be shared among friends on the harbour wall.

items.name: Dirty Fries
items.description: Crispy seasoned fries topped with smokey chopped bacon, red onion, garlic butter, fresh chilli, and melted cheddar.

items.name: Braised Lamb Fries
items.description: Rustic skin-on fries loaded with slow-cooked shoulder lamb, sweet mint oil, crumbled Greek feta, and roasted sweet peppers.

items.name: Garlic Butter Mushrooms
items.description: Sautéed field mushrooms drenched in garlic, herbs, and local farm butter. Served hot.

items.name: Mozzarella Sticks
items.description: Golden breaded mozzarella cheese sticks, melting centre, served with a rich tomato and herb dip.

items.name: Oven Baked Meatballs
items.description: Seasoned beef and pork meatballs, baked in a rich house garlic red pepper sauce, glazed with mozzarella.

description: Our signature dishes representing the heart of the Harbour House experience.

items.name: HH 6oz Burger
items.description: Prime beef patty, crispy pancetta, fresh lettuce, sliced beef tomato, house onion relish, served with seasoned chips, crispy onion rings, and homemade slaw.

items.name: HH 10oz Sirloin
items.description: Premium 10oz aged sirloin steak cooked to your liking, signature HH jus sauce, crispy onion rings, chunky chips, and a dressed garden side salad.

items.name: Malaysian Chicken Skewer
items.description: Marinated chicken thigh skewers in aromatic coconut, ginger, and lemongrass spices. Served with a crisp side salad and warm flatbread.

description: Fresh seafood landed locally and prepared by our kitchen team.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Traditional battered local cod, double-cooked chunky chips, garden peas, fresh lemon wedge, and house tartare sauce.

items.name: Moules marinière
items.description: Fresh Isle of Wight mussels steamed in a classic creamy white wine, garlic, and parsley broth. Served with toasted rustic sourdough bread.

items.name: Curry Mussels
items.description: Isle of Wight mussels steamed in a warm coconut curry, red chilli, and fresh coriander broth. Served with seasoned skin-on chips.

description: Perfect accompaniments to complement your main dishes.

items.name: Chips
items.description: Double-cooked rustic chips seasoned with sea salt flakes.

items.name: Slaw
items.description: Freshly shredded red and white cabbage, carrots, bound in seasoned mayonnaise.

items.name: Salad Bowl
items.description: Crisp mixed garden greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, house vinaigrette.

items.name: Sourdough
items.description: Toasted local bakery sourdough bread served with soft salted butter.

items.name: Onion Rings
items.description: Giant beer-battered onion rings fried until golden and crispy.

description: Smaller portions designed for children under 12.

items.name: Kids Fish & Chips
items.description: Mini battered cod fillet, chips, and choice of garden peas or baked beans.

items.name: Kids Cheese Burger & Chips
items.description: 4oz beef patty, melted cheddar cheese in a soft bun, served with chips.

items.name: Kids Chicken Nuggets & Chips
items.description: Crispy golden battered chicken breast chunks, served with chips and beans.

description: Hand-crafted seaside cocktails (£10) and refreshing mocktails (£6).

items.name: Pornstar Martini
items.description: Vanilla vodka, passionfruit liqueur, fresh passionfruit juice, pineapple juice. Served with a shot of Prosecco.

items.name: Espresso Martini
items.description: Vanilla vodka, Kahlúa coffee liqueur, double shot of fresh espresso, sugar syrup.

items.name: Spicy Margarita
items.description: Premium tequila, triple-sec, fresh red chilli slices, lime juice, salted rim.

items.name: Sunset Mojito
items.description: White rum, muddled lime, fresh garden mint, sugar syrup, soda. Available as Mocktail. Flavours: Strawberry, Passionfruit, Mango, Raspberry.

items.name: Piña Colada
items.description: White rum, Malibu coconut rum, pineapple juice, coconut cream, fresh cream. Available as Mocktail.

items.name: Hugo Spritz
items.description: Gin, elderflower liqueur, Prosecco, fresh mint leaves, soda.

items.name: Aperol Spritz
items.description: Classic Italian Aperol, sparkling Prosecco, splash of soda, orange slice.

items.name: Amaretto Sour
items.description: Disaronno Amaretto, fresh lemon juice, egg white, angostura bitters. Available as Mocktail.

items.name: The Mermaid
items.description: Vanilla vodka, triple-sec, fresh lime juice, cranberry juice.

description: Selection of ice-cold draught beers and premium bottled ciders.

items.name: Madrí Exceptional (Draught)
items.description: Crisp, clean Spanish lager, light golden color with a light floral aroma (4.6% ABV).

items.name: Cruzcampo (Draught)
items.description: Traditional Andalusian lager, light and refreshing with a smooth finish (4.4% ABV).

items.name: Alpacalypse IPA (Draught)
items.description: Locally brewed punchy craft IPA, loaded with tropical citrus hops (6.3% ABV).

items.name: Sharp's Cold River Cider (Draught)
items.description: Crisp and clean Somerset apple cider with a refreshing dry finish (4.5% ABV).

items.name: Corona Extra (Bottle)
items.description: Classic Mexican lager served with a wedge of fresh lime (4.5% ABV).

items.name: Old Mout Cider (Bottle)
items.description: Premium kiwi and lime flavoured fruit cider (4% ABV).

items.name: Estrella Galicia 0.0% (Bottle)
items.description: Delicious non-alcoholic Spanish lager with full pilsner flavor.

items.name: Guinness 0.0% (Bottle)
items.description: Non-alcoholic stout, dark ruby color with a creamy white head.

description: Curated wine list available by the glass (175ml/250ml) or bottle.

items.name: Ormarine, Picpoul de Pinet (France)
items.description: Zesty, dry white wine with lemon peel and mineral notes. Perfect with seafood (12.5% ABV).

items.name: Seven Degrees, Sauvignon Blanc (NZ)
items.description: Classic Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc with gooseberry and elderflower punch (12.5% ABV).

items.name: Brightwater Bay, Sauvignon Blanc (S.A)
items.description: Crisp and fresh with grass and tropical fruit undertones (12.5% ABV).

items.name: Amori, Pinot Grigio (Italy)
items.description: Light, dry, and easy drinking white wine with clean apple flavors (11% ABV).

items.name: Amori Pinot Grigio Blush (Italy)
items.description: Fruity and elegant rosé wine with strawberry and cherry accents (11% ABV).

items.name: Whispering Angel, Cotes de Provence (France)
items.description: World-class, dry and pale rosé with delicate red fruit and mineral notes (13% ABV).

items.name: Maison Mirabeau Azure, Provence (France)
items.description: Stunningly fresh, aromatic and dry Provence rosé, ideal for sunset sipping (13% ABV).

items.name: 33 South, Malbec (Argentina)
items.description: Rich, full-bodied red wine with dark plum, spice, and smooth oak (13.5% ABV).

items.name: Ladera Verde, Merlot (Chile)
items.description: Smooth, medium-bodied red wine with soft plum and berry flavours (12.5% ABV).

items.name: Rioja Crianza, Rioja (Spain)
items.description: Beautiful Spanish red, vanilla and toasted oak notes, smooth finish (13.5% ABV).

items.name: Amori Prosecco Spumante (Italy)
items.description: Crisp sparkling wine with fine bubbles and fresh apple aromas (11% ABV).

items.name: Moët & Chandon Brut Champagne (France)
items.description: Distinguished, elegant, and dry French champagne for celebrations (12% ABV).

description: Selection of spirits and soft drinks available at the bar.

items.name: Soft Drinks Selection
items.description: Selection of soft and hot drinks available, including Coca-Cola, juices, tonic water, teas, and coffees.

items.name: Spirits Selection
items.description: Premium selection of gins, rums, vodkas, whiskeys, and liqueurs available at the bar.
